yaml:
destination:
  table_name: failure_and_rollback
presentation:
  columns:
  - '*'
  sort:
  - column: avg_salary
    order_by: ASC
source:
  materialization: TABLE
  table_name: employee
transform:
  aggregate:
    aggregate_columns:
    - alias: avg_salary
      column: salary
      function: AVG
  group:
  - profession
  union:
    ignore_duplicate: false
